AI

Professional-class legal AI inside the work

Research, draft, review, and run agents where matters already live — starting with AI Intake that understands the case and matches counsel.

AI Intake
Client: Terminated without notice after 3 years…
Structured: Employment · AE-DIFC · High urgency
Ready to match verified lawyers

Tools

Each assistant sits inside the same matter context.

Legal research

Ask grounded questions across statutes, cases, and your matter files.

Drafting

Generate memos, letters, and first-draft agreements with controls.

Contract review

Flag risk, missing clauses, and negotiation points in seconds.

AI intake

Structure client facts into practice area, jurisdiction, and urgency.

Legal agents

Multi-step workflows for diligence, summarization, and follow-ups.

Grounded in the matter

Prompts can pull from intake briefs, documents, and notes — reducing generic answers and copy-paste risk.

Human in the loop

Outputs are suggestions. Lawyers approve, edit, and attach work product to the matter trail.

Jurisdiction aware

Ontology for GCC and corridor practice areas keeps routing and labeling consistent across products.

Audit-friendly

Sessions and actions can be tracked for firm and enterprise compliance reviews.

Start with intake

The fastest path into Barristrly is describing your case to the AI Intake assistant.
